headings: Pakistan’s Fitness Revolution Begins with Jacked Nutrition.
website_data.meta_description: Jacked Nutrition, an online supplement store, offers high-quality supplements in Pakistan. A wide range of protein, creatine, pre-workout, mass gainer & more
paragraphs: Not sure where to start? Try these collections:
This site uses cookies for better user experience and analytics.

We started with a simple idea in 2012, to change the perspective on how people from Pakistan approach fitness. We started without an investment with just $10 in the pocket in a small room with a big dream to serve our people. Today, Jacked Nutrition presents seven retail stores, a leading online presence, and the largest gym in Pakistan. We started with one person and one goal at a time and aim to provide the best fitness experience. For us, it’s always been about helping people live better and reach their full potential.
ISO JACKED WHEY PROTEIN - ULTRA-PREMIUM WHEY BLEND
Fuel Your Fitness – Tailored for Your Goals
Build lean muscle, boost strength, and enhance recovery. 💪
Burn fat, boost metabolism, and stay lean with every workout. 🔥
Gain mass, build strength, and power up like a beast! 💪
Fuel strength, endurance, and recovery for peak performance.💪
Stay active, feel great, and live a healthier life every day. 🌿
Showcasing how Jacked Nutrition fuels every goal, every grind.

reviews.text: Been coming here since 4 months now. The pool is perfect size for beginners, I enjoy alot here. The pool staff is super friendly and helpful especially sir mudassar. He taught me how to swim, he was very helpful and supportive i learned swimming within a week, my experience here has been AMAZING so far. Overall staff is also very friendly I love hanging out with them they’re very fun people!! The ambiance and cleanliness is also a 10/10. Recently joined the gym aswell and i love it here.

I’ve been training at Jacked for 4 months now, and hands down, it’s the best gym in Islamabad! The equipment is top-notch, and the staff is super helpful. The cleanliness is always on point, and the overall vibe of the gym makes it such a motivating place to work out. I also love that they offer a separate time for ladies, ensuring total privacy for women. Although it would be best if they had extended hours for women, however, I’ve never had any issues in my 4 months here. Highly recommend this gym to anyone looking for a great fitness experience within a budget!

I began swimming three months ago with no prior experience. I was fortunate to meet Sir Muddasir, a humble and educated instructor. His technique and calm behavior made my swimming journey amazing. As a beginner, he created an environment that boosted my confidence, enabling me to swim on my own. He taught me various techniques and water safety skills. I am happy to have learned from him. Please note that the ladies' shower room and lighting require attention and maintenance. The front desk staff is very helpful and kind. I recommend everyone join, as it is a safe and good facility.

the water is cold in the pool and the geyser we’ve been complaining for so long about this I brought my daughter today and she got sick because of this cold water. We come to the pool to relax and chill in the warm water but instead we’re greeted with cold water and sickness. The management is absolutely terrible there is no temperature control whatsoever and it’s a very chilly season so this should be controlled and cold water should be avoided.

Honestly
The gym’s always clean, the equipment is solid, and the vibe keeps you motivated. The trainers are cool and act

Excellent gym with well-maintained machines and a clean atmosphere. Trainers are professional and supportive, always ready to help. The environment keeps you motivated, whether you’re a beginner or experienced. Totally worth it!

My sister and I were guided by Miss Ayesha at the Jacked fitness gym to take a three-month swimming package after being clearly told that the membership could be frozen anytime. Based on this assurance, we paid for the deal. I only attended for three days due to college and school, but when I requested a one-month freeze, it was refused, and new conditions (valid only for February) were mentioned which were never disclosed at the time of purchase. Neither a freeze nor a refund was offered, despite minimal usage. This feels misleading and unprofessional, and I hope the management ensures clearer communication and fair treatment of customers. I request either a refund or a proper freeze of my unused month.

Me and my sister were clearly promised by Miss Ayesha at Jacked Fitness Gym that the three-month swimming package could be frozen anytime, which is why we paid for it. After attending for only three days due to college and school, my request for a one-month freeze was flatly denied, and completely new rules (only valid for February) were suddenly invented—rules that were never mentioned at the time of purchase. Despite almost zero usage, the gym refused both a freeze and a refund. This is misleading, dishonest, and highly unprofessional behavior. Changing terms after taking payment is unacceptable. I demand either a full refund or a proper freeze of my unused month.

Hey i am coming to jfa and taking student package here prices are less and the service is best. The staff specially csr maam ayesha is so humble and kind to serve. Highly satisfied will always prefer coming here and suggest everyone to join jacked arena
Good need and clean gym. Love the swimming pool speacially the pool temperature the water remain warm which is a the rea
My swimming classes with Dr. Mudasir Iqbal He is very nice and give proper classes, teach very nicely it's honorable for me to have This kind of coach

hey! for me they're multiple reasons to join jfa first of all is hygienic and clean environment, secondly the welcoming behavior of staff and lastly the elite class aesthetic theme of gym creates the vibe and it’s fun working out here.😍💪🏻 highly satisfied and will suggest everyone to join jacked fitness arena …

Hello i am jacked member since last year, love the ambiance and the professional behaviour of the managment literally they treat you like a family, Pool is my favorite part 😍🏊 thankyou for providing quailty service and mainting the standards would recommend everyone 💪🔥 …

Hi, I am so happy to share my sons swimming experience here at jacked fitness club... The pool environment n hygiene was really commendable, not for a single day we faced an issue. We exclusively came after Sir mudassir Iqbal the swimming coach there, who had trained other kids in our family too... As my little one was always so damn scared of even stepping into pool but the man is really professional and I saw my son enjoying independent swimming with so much confidence in a month... They were so happy with the sir as he was humble and supportive with them and they were not ready to learn from anyone else in town. Whoever wants him as a coach won't regret... Highly recommended!
